encounter.reason: Pre-move visit, records transfer, medication reconciliation
encounter.location: Hawthorne Health Center, 3847 SE Hawthorne Blvd, Portland, OR 97214

conditions.name: alcohol use disorder, moderate, in sustained remission

medications.name: lamotrigine 200 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet (200 mg) by mouth once daily

medications.name: quetiapine 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet (50 mg) by mouth at bedtime

medications.name: naltrexone 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet (50 mg) by mouth once daily

document_references.description: Office visit note documenting final pre-move visit. Covers subjective report of stable mood and sustained sobriety, objective vitals and PHQ-2 screening, medication reconciliation of all three active medications, active problem list review and update, 90-day bridge prescriptions, preparation of comprehensive care summary letter for new PCP, records transfer initiation, and conclusion of care at Hawthorne Health Center.

Comprehensive care summary prepared for patient's new primary care provider in Seattle, including active problem list, medication history, psychiatric treatment course, and substance use disorder recovery history. Provided to patient for transfer.
